d: backdrop-filter:blur(20px) + rgba fill + 1px border at 12% opacity
tip: Always pair with a colorful background behind it — glass on void-black does nothing
adv: backdrop-filter:blur(20px) bg:rgba(255,255,255,0.06) border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12). Pair with vivid gradient background behind.

d: Thick black borders, flat color fills, hard drop shadows (no blur), oversized raw type
tip: Works best monochromatic or with one saturated accent. Color + brutalism = chaos.
adv: border:2-3px solid #000, box-shadow:4px 4px 0 #000 (no blur), flat fill, oversized raw type. Zero gradients, zero rounded corners.

d: Asymmetric mosaic — cards spanning multiple columns/rows, single consistent gap
tip: Gap consistency is the only rule. Vary cell size, not gap size.
adv: CSS grid with named areas, consistent 16px gaps, cards spanning multiple columns. Each card = one focused content unit.

d: Single saturated color against void-black. Everything else is neutral.
tip: One accent per screen. Two accents = neither is special.
adv: One saturated color (#4DFFFF or #FF4FD8) on #0B0D10 bg. Everything else is neutral. One accent per viewport maximum.

d: Mesh gradient or animated blob that shifts hue — never static
tip: Use CSS @keyframes on hue-rotate or a canvas/WebGL loop for motion version
adv: CSS @keyframes on hue-rotate() or mesh gradient with animated positions. 8-12s loop. Background layer only, never foreground.

d: Designed dark-first. Light mode is the adaptation.
tip: Elevation changes on dark-native: higher = lighter. Opposite of light mode.
adv: Base #0B0D10 or #111. Higher surface = slightly lighter (+8%). Use rgba overlays for elevation, not gray fills.

d: Inflated 3D soft shapes, multi-layer inner shadows, saturated pastel fills
tip: inner-shadow: inset 0 -6px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.2) is the key property
adv: Large border-radius:24-32px, inner-shadow:inset 0 -6px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), saturated pastel fills, inflated 3D appearance.

d: Soft flowing color bands (green, violet, blue) with noise texture overlay
tip: Low saturation + high blur radius + noise grain on top = aurora effect
adv: Soft radial gradients (green, violet, blue) at 20-30% opacity + 40px blur + noise overlay at 4% opacity on top.

d: SVG feTurbulence or CSS noise at 3-8% opacity for tactile depth
tip: Add mix-blend-mode:overlay to make grain color-adaptive
adv: SVG feTurbulence or CSS noise image at 3-6% opacity. Add mix-blend-mode:overlay for color-adaptive grain.

d: Map image shadows to one color, highlights to another — removes color, adds brand
tip: Use CSS: filter:sepia(1) hue-rotate(Xdeg) saturate(Y) for quick duotone
adv: CSS filter:sepia(1) hue-rotate(Xdeg) saturate(Y). Shadows map to brand color, highlights to white.

d: Radial-gradient overlay darkening edges toward center — focuses attention inward
tip: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 60%, rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 100%)
adv: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 60%, rgba(0,0,0,0.65) 100%) on pseudo-element over full container.

d: Repeating 1-2px semi-transparent horizontal lines — retro CRT aesthetic
tip: CSS: repeating-linear-gradient(transparent, transparent 2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 4px)
adv: repeating-linear-gradient(transparent 0, transparent 1px, rgba(0,0,0,0.08) 1px, rgba(0,0,0,0.08) 2px) background-size:100% 4px.

d: RGB channel offset creating color-fringe glitch effect at element edges
tip: CSS filter:drop-shadow(2px 0 0 red) drop-shadow(-2px 0 0 cyan) on text or images
adv: CSS filter:drop-shadow(2px 0 0 rgba(255,0,0,0.5)) drop-shadow(-2px 0 0 rgba(0,255,255,0.5)) on text or SVG edges.

d: Multi-point gradient with color bleeding between anchors — no hard stops
tip: Use Figma Mesh Gradient plugin or Three.js ShaderMaterial for animated version
adv: 4-6 radial-gradient circles at different coordinates, animate positions with @keyframes for a living background.

d: Animated shimmer placeholder matching exact layout of pending content
tip: Shape must mirror real content dimensions — not generic boxes. Use same border-radius.
adv: Placeholder divs matching exact content dimensions. Shimmer: background:linear-gradient(90deg,#1a1a1a 25%,#2a2a2a 50%,#1a1a1a 75%) animated on X axis.

d: Subtle looping BG animation — slow float, soft pulse at <30% opacity
tip: Never draw attention. Peripheral motion only. opacity < 0.3 is the rule.
adv: CSS @keyframes translateY(-8px) over 6-8s ease-in-out infinite alternate. Max opacity 0.25. Peripheral only, never focal.

d: Reveal complexity only on demand — accordion, drill-down, hover expand
tip: Default state shows essentials only. Complexity unlocks on explicit user action.
adv: Default: essentials only. Reveal details on click/hover. max-height:0 to max-height:500px transition or accordion. Never show complexity upfront.

d: Animation fires at % viewport entry — GSAP ScrollTrigger or Framer viewport prop
tip: GSAP: start:'top 80%' end:'top 20%' for clean entry/exit control
adv: GSAP ScrollTrigger: gsap.from(el,{scrollTrigger:{trigger:el,start:'top 80%'},y:40,opacity:0,duration:0.6}). Or CSS @scroll-timeline.

d: List items animate in sequence — 50-100ms delay between each element
tip: Use CSS animation-delay:calc(var(--i)*60ms) for zero-JS stagger
adv: CSS animation-delay:calc(var(--i)*60ms) on each child. opacity 0 to 1 + translateY 20px to 0 over 400ms ease-out.

d: Easing with overshoot — Framer: type:'spring', stiffness:400, damping:30
tip: High stiffness + low damping = snappy. Low stiffness + high damping = sluggish.
adv: Framer: spring({stiffness:400,damping:30}). CSS: cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1). Controlled overshoot without infinite bounce.

d: Cursor proximity pulls button position — GSAP quickTo transform on mousemove
tip: Clamp max pull to 30-40% of button size. Beyond that feels broken.
adv: JS mousemove: calculate distance from center, gsap.quickTo moves element max 30% of its size toward cursor. Reset on mouseleave.

d: SVG path morphing between states — GSAP MorphSVGPlugin or Flubber.js
tip: Source and target paths need same number of points for clean morph
adv: GSAP MorphSVGPlugin.to(el,{morphSVG:targetPath}). Source and target must have same number of anchor points.

d: Text that animates char-by-char, scrubs on scroll, or morphs between states
tip: GSAP SplitText or Splitting.js for char-level control. CSS for word-level.
adv: GSAP SplitText({type:'chars,words'}). gsap.from(split.chars,{opacity:0,y:20,stagger:0.04,duration:0.4}). Trigger on scroll or mount.

d: Sub-200ms feedback on every state change — button press, checkbox, input shake
tip: Every interaction needs a state. Default → hover → active → disabled → loading → success
adv: hover:scale(1.02) 150ms ease-out. press:scale(0.97) 80ms ease-in. focus-visible ring 2px offset-2. loading spinner on async ops.

d: WebGL 3D with camera, lights, mesh geometry + PBR materials, RAF loop
tip: Use drei helpers (OrbitControls, Environment) to skip boilerplate. Install @react-three/drei
adv: new THREE.Scene() + PerspectiveCamera(75,w/h,0.1,1000) + WebGLRenderer + AmbientLight + DirectionalLight. Use OrbitControls from drei.

d: GLSL fragment/vertex shaders for GPU-computed visual effects
tip: Start with Shadertoy examples. Always provide CSS fallback for low-end devices.
adv: GLSL vertex passes UV coords, fragment uses time uniform for animation. Always provide CSS visual fallback for low-end devices.

d: GPU-instanced Points or tsParticles — avoid DOM-based particles entirely
tip: Three.js Points + InstancedMesh. DOM particles > 200 will tank mobile.
adv: new THREE.Points(new THREE.BufferGeometry(), new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:0.05})). Set 1000-5000 random positions in Float32Array.

d: Chained animation sequence with scrub, reverse, and repeat — gsap.timeline({paused:true})
tip: paused:true on init, then .play() on trigger. Enables scroll-scrub and reversible animations.

d: Pin, scrub, snap, and batch animations tied to scroll position
tip: scrub:1 = smooth follow. scrub:true = instant. pin:true pauses scroll. Use markers:true for debug.
adv: gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger); gsap.from(el,{scrollTrigger:{trigger:el,start:'top 80%',scrub:1},y:40,opacity:0}).

d: Splits text into chars/words/lines for individual animation control
tip: type:'chars,words' then stagger each char. Combine with ScrollTrigger for scroll-driven reveals.
adv: const split=new SplitText(el,{type:'chars,words'}); gsap.from(split.chars,{opacity:0,y:20,stagger:0.04,ease:'power2.out'}).

d: Animates DOM layout changes — reorder, filter, show/hide with physics
tip: Flip.fit() before DOM change, Flip.from(state) after. Zero manual positioning needed.
adv: const state=Flip.getState(el); [apply DOM change]; Flip.from(state,{duration:0.5,ease:'power2.inOut'}).

d: State-machine interactive animation — reacts to user input in real time
tip: Use Rive's state machine for button hover/press without JS. Lighter than Lottie.
adv: Rive: use useRive() hook from the rive-app canvas package. Pass src, stateMachines, autoplay props.

d: JSON-based After Effects export — frame-accurate vector animation
tip: Optimize in LottieFiles editor first. Large Lottie files (>200kb) block LCP.
adv: Lottie: use Lottie component from lottie pkg. Pass animationData, loop, style props. Optimize file size first.

d: CSS perspective + rotateX/Y on mousemove — Vanilla Tilt or 10 lines of JS
tip: Add perspective:1000px on parent. Clamp rotation to ±15deg max for comfort.
adv: Parent: perspective:1000px. mousemove: el.style.transform=`rotateX(${-dy*.1}deg) rotateY(${dx*.1}deg)`. Clamp to max ±15deg.

d: Magazine-style: oversized type, text-image overlap, asymmetry, bleeds
tip: Break the grid intentionally — one bleed element per section max
adv: CSS grid named areas, display type clamp(48px,8vw,120px), text-image overlap with negative margins, full-bleed sections.

d: All spacing is a multiple of 8px — creates visual harmony without thinking
tip: 4px for tight internal spacing, 8px gaps, 16/24/32/48/64px for layout zones
adv: All spacing values must be multiples of 8px: 8,16,24,32,48,64. Tight internal spacing: 4px. Component gap: 8px. Section: 48-64px.

d: Font sizes that scale between viewport sizes — clamp(min, fluid, max)
tip: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw + 0.5rem, 3rem) — eliminates typography breakpoints
adv: font-size:clamp(1rem, 2.5vw + 0.5rem, 3rem). Never use vw alone — always clamp between min and max values.

d: Components that respond to their container width, not viewport
tip: @container (min-width: 400px) {} — enables true component-level responsiveness

d: Replace OS cursor with SVG/div — tracks with GSAP quickTo for lag effect
tip: Hide on touch devices: @media (pointer:coarse) { cursor: auto; }

d: Thin luminous strands on dark canvas — Three.js Lines or canvas 2D with glow
tip: Use ctx.shadowBlur=20 + ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.8)' on canvas
adv: canvas 2D with animated bezier curves: ctx.shadowBlur=20, ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(77,255,255,0.8)', RAF loop updates positions.

d: backdrop-filter:blur(20px) for modals — check Firefox support
tip: Add @supports not (backdrop-filter:blur()) fallback with semi-opaque solid bg
adv: backdrop-filter:blur(20px). @supports not (backdrop-filter:blur()){background:rgba(11,13,16,0.92)} as fallback.

d: Input placeholder rises to label on focus — CSS :focus + translateY
tip: Never remove placeholder entirely. Use aria-label or title attribute as fallback
adv: position:absolute label over input. On :focus or :not(:placeholder-shown): translateY(-24px) scale(0.8) with 200ms ease transition.

d: CSS scroll-snap-type for carousel and page-based navigation
tip: scroll-snap-type:x mandatory on container, scroll-snap-align:start on children
adv: Container: overflow-x:scroll scroll-snap-type:x mandatory. Children: scroll-snap-align:start. Add scroll-padding-left on container.

d: Pinterest-style variable-height card layout
tip: CSS grid-template-rows:masonry not supported everywhere — use JS masonry lib or columns:2-3
adv: CSS columns:2 column-gap:16px. Children: break-inside:avoid. Or JS Masonry library. CSS masonry (grid-template-rows:masonry) is experimental.

d: Sequence charts+annotations to guide viewer to insight
tip: Start with the insight in the title. Every chart element supports one claim.
adv: Put the insight in the chart title. Every annotation supports one claim. Remove all data that does not serve the story.

d: Inline micro-chart 24px tall — shows trend without axes, used in KPI cards
tip: width:80px height:24px no axes no labels. SVG or canvas. Shows direction not values.
adv: SVG path 80x24px, no axes, no labels. Smooth points with bezier. stroke:currentColor fill:none strokeWidth:1.5.

d: Value + delta vs prior period + sparkline + context label
tip: 4 elements: number, delta (% and absolute), sparkline, label. Missing any = incomplete.
adv: Large number (clamp 28px,4vw,48px) + delta badge (color + % + absolute) + 80px sparkline + context label. No chart axes.

d: 2D grid where color intensity encodes value magnitude
tip: Sequential scale (white to color) for one metric. Diverging for pos/neg (red-white-blue).
adv: CSS grid cells with background:hsl(220,80%,calc(95% - value*60%)) for sequential scale. Tooltip shows value on hover.

d: Running total showing sequential additions and subtractions to final value
tip: Best for financial breakdowns. Bars stacked not grouped. Use D3 or Recharts.
adv: Stacked bars where each starts where previous ended. Green positive, red negative, gray subtotal. Use D3 or Recharts.

d: Flow viz where band width = quantity flowing between nodes
tip: D3 sankey plugin. Best for: user journeys, budget allocation, conversion funnels.
adv: D3 Sankey: use sankey() layout + sankeyLinkHorizontal() from d3 sankey plugin. Nodes=rects, links=paths, width=quantity.

d: Single font file with continuous weight/width axes — animate between values on scroll
tip: font-variation-settings: 'wght' 100 to 900 animatable in CSS. One file, infinite styles.
adv: font-variation-settings: wght 400. GSAP animate: gsap.to(el,{fontVariationSettings:'wght 900',scrollTrigger:{scrub:1}}). One file, infinite weight range.

d: Chars/words/lines appear sequentially via clip-path or opacity stagger
tip: GSAP SplitText + stagger 0.04s per char. CSS: clip-path:inset(0 100% 0 0) to inset(0 0 0 0).
adv: clip-path:inset(0 100% 0 0) to inset(0 0% 0 0). Or GSAP: gsap.from(split.chars,{clipPath:'inset(0 100% 0 0)',stagger:0.04}).
